body.title: CLOSED: Backfill Pass condition into Gmail tickets
body.result: Both Gmail tickets updated in DB with pass condition: Igor opens gmail.com, navigates inbox, extracts sender+subject.
body.description:
Update T-gmail-pages-build-to-flow-spec and T-gmail-flow-integration-test descriptions to include their known pass conditions. Pass condition for both: Igor's browser profile opens gmail.com, navigates to inbox, and can extract sender + subject from the newest unread email — without CC involvement.

**Affected files:** queue.json (description fields only)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN = add pass condition text to those two ticket descriptions; OUT = no scope change to the tickets themselves, no code changes
**Test plan:** cc_queue.py show for both tickets shows a 'Pass condition:' line
**Pass condition:** both Gmail ticket descriptions contain an explicit 'Pass condition:' line when shown via cc_queue.py show
